options.formula:
RIGHT(
  {File},
  LEN({File}) - FIND(
    "/",
    {File},
    FIND(
      "/",
      {File},
      FIND(
        "/",
        {File},
        FIND("/", {File}, LEN({File}) - 100)
      )
    )
  )
)

fields.name: description
fields.defaultValue: This project contains briefs for [campaign name/product launch]. All content should align with [brand voice/seasonal theme] and target [audience]. Deadline: [date]. Team members can collaborate on reviews and approvals.

options.formula: IF( {private_mode}, ' Private', ' Public' )
'<sl-copy-button value="' & {live_link} & '" copy-label="Click to copy" success-label="You did it!" error-label="Whoops, your browser does not support this"></sl-copy-button>'

fields.name: transcript
fields.defaultValue: No spoken words

options.formula: '<sl-copy-button value="' & {transcript} & '" copy-label="Click to copy" success-label="You did it!" error-label="Whoops, your browser does not support this"></sl-copy-button>'

IF({clean_adapted_script}, 
  CONCATENATE('<sl-copy-button value="', {clean_adapted_script}, '" copy-label="Click to copy" success-label="You did it!" error-label="Whoops, your browser does not support this"></sl-copy-button>'),
  ""
)

LEFT(
  TRIM(
    IF({product_screen_time_status} = "FAIL", "Product Screen Time, ", "") &
    IF({hook_speed_status} = "FAIL", "Hook Speed, ", "") &
    IF({cta_placement_status} = "FAIL", "CTA Placement, ", "") &
    IF({face_time_status} = "FAIL", "Face Time, ", "") &
    IF({text_legibility_status} = "FAIL", "Text Legibility, ", "") &
    IF({audio_clarity_status} = "FAIL", "Audio Clarity, ", "") &
    IF({engagement_pacing_status} = "FAIL", "Engagement Pacing, ", "") &
    IF({brand_mention_count_status} = "FAIL", "Brand Mention Count, ", "")
  ),
  LEN(
    TRIM(
      IF({product_screen_time_status} = "FAIL", "Product Screen Time, ", "") &
      IF({hook_speed_status} = "FAIL", "Hook Speed, ", "") &
      IF({cta_placement_status} = "FAIL", "CTA Placement, ", "") &
      IF({face_time_status} = "FAIL", "Face Time, ", "") &
      IF({text_legibility_status} = "FAIL", "Text Legibility, ", "") &
      IF({audio_clarity_status} = "FAIL", "Audio Clarity, ", "") &
      IF({engagement_pacing_status} = "FAIL", "Engagement Pacing, ", "") &
      IF({brand_mention_count_status} = "FAIL", "Brand Mention Count, ", "")
    )
  ) - 1
)

IF(
  {display_url} != "",
  "<iframe width='315' height='560' src='" & SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE({display_url}, "http://", "https://"), ".mov", ".mp4") & "' frameborder='0' allowfullscreen></iframe>",
  ""
)

IF(
  {submission_type (submissions)} = "Example/Swipe File",
  "This is an example video for reference only.",
  IF(
    OR(
      {product_screen_time_status} = "FAIL",
      {hook_speed_status} = "FAIL",
      {cta_placement_status} = "FAIL",
      {face_time_status} = "FAIL",
      {text_legibility_status} = "FAIL",
      {audio_clarity_status} = "FAIL",
      {engagement_pacing_status} = "FAIL",
      {brand_mention_count_status} = "FAIL",
      {copyright_status} = "FAIL",
      {content_moderation_status} = "FAIL"
    ),
    CONCATENATE(
      "Please make the following changes:\n\n",
      IF({product_screen_time_status} = "FAIL", "• Product visibility: " & {product_screen_time_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({hook_speed_status} = "FAIL", "• Hook timing: " & {hook_speed_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({cta_placement_status} = "FAIL", "• Call-to-action: " & {cta_placement_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({face_time_status} = "FAIL", "• Creator visibility: " & {face_time_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({text_legibility_status} = "FAIL", "• Text quality: " & {text_legibility_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({audio_clarity_status} = "FAIL", "• Audio quality: " & {audio_clarity_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({engagement_pacing_status} = "FAIL", "• Scene changes: " & {engagement_pacing_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({brand_mention_count_status} = "FAIL", "• Brand mentions: " & {brand_mention_count_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({copyright_status} = "FAIL", "• Copyright: " & {copyright_details} & "\n", ""),
      IF({content_moderation_status} = "FAIL", "• Content moderation: " & {content_moderation_details} & "\n", ""),
      "\nPlease resubmit once these issues are addressed."
    ),
    "All quality thresholds passed! Great work."
  )
)

IF(
  CONCATENATE(
    IF({transcript}, CONCATENATE("Transcript: ", {transcript}, "

"), ""),
    IF({overall_comment}, CONCATENATE("Overall: ", {overall_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({face_time_comment}, CONCATENATE("Face Time: ", {face_time_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({hook_speed_comment}, CONCATENATE("Hook Speed: ", {hook_speed_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({visual_hook_comment}, CONCATENATE("Visual Hook: ", {visual_hook_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({audio_clarity_comment}, CONCATENATE("Audio Clarity: ", {audio_clarity_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({cta_placement_comment}, CONCATENATE("CTA Placement: ", {cta_placement_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({text_legibility_comment}, CONCATENATE("Text Legibility: ", {text_legibility_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({engagement_pacing_comment}, CONCATENATE("Engagement Pacing: ", {engagement_pacing_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({brand_mention_count_comment}, CONCATENATE("Brand Mentions: ", {brand_mention_count_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({product_screen_time_comment}, CONCATENATE("Product Screen Time: ", {product_screen_time_comment}, "

"), "")
  ),
  TRIM(CONCATENATE(
    IF({transcript}, CONCATENATE("Transcript: ", {transcript}, "

"), ""),
    IF({overall_comment}, CONCATENATE("Overall: ", {overall_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({face_time_comment}, CONCATENATE("Face Time: ", {face_time_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({hook_speed_comment}, CONCATENATE("Hook Speed: ", {hook_speed_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({visual_hook_comment}, CONCATENATE("Visual Hook: ", {visual_hook_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({audio_clarity_comment}, CONCATENATE("Audio Clarity: ", {audio_clarity_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({cta_placement_comment}, CONCATENATE("CTA Placement: ", {cta_placement_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({text_legibility_comment}, CONCATENATE("Text Legibility: ", {text_legibility_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({engagement_pacing_comment}, CONCATENATE("Engagement Pacing: ", {engagement_pacing_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({brand_mention_count_comment}, CONCATENATE("Brand Mentions: ", {brand_mention_count_comment}, "

"), ""),
    IF({product_screen_time_comment}, CONCATENATE("Product Screen Time: ", {product_screen_time_comment}, "

"), "")
  )),
  ""
)

fields.name: brand_bio
fields.defaultValue: [Brand name] creates [product category] for [target customer]. We're known for [key differentiator or hero product]. [Brief brand positioning statement].

fields.name: brand_voice
fields.defaultValue: [Tone adjective], [tone adjective], and [tone adjective]. We speak like [relatable comparison]. Keep it [style guidance].

fields.name: brand_cta
fields.defaultValue:
- Visit [website]
- [Promotional offer]
- [Shipping/guarantee benefit]

fields.name: target_audience
fields.defaultValue:
- [Demographics: age, lifestyle, frequency of use]
- [Psychographics: values, interests, community]
- [Behaviors: shopping habits, priorities]

fields.name: audience_pain_points
fields.defaultValue:
- [Pain point 1: specific problem with current solutions]
- [Pain point 2: frustration or limitation they experience]
- [Pain point 3: consequence of not solving the problem]

fields.name: audience_objectives
fields.defaultValue:
- [Objective 1: what they want to achieve]
- [Objective 2: how they want to feel]
- [Objective 3: practical outcome they're seeking]

fields.name: niche
fields.defaultValue:
- [Market category or positioning]
- [Unique angle or approach]
- [Target customer segment or community]

options.formula:
IF(
  {display_url} != "",
  "<iframe width='315' height='560' src='" & SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE({display_url}, "http://", "https://"), ".mov", ".mp4") & "' frameborder='0' allowfullscreen></iframe>",
  ""
)

fields.name: brieflee_logo
fields.defaultValue: https://res.cloudinary.com/dspv9nm1n/image/upload/v1764674090/cebeyey9ggusdrbakdvt.png

fields.name: name
fields.defaultValue: Untitled Brief

fields.name: description
fields.defaultValue: Create [type of content] featuring [product name]. Show [key product benefit] in the first 3 seconds. Video should be [duration] long, filmed in [lighting/setting]. Mention [brand name] at least [X] times. Target audience is [audience description]. Tone should be [casual/professional/energetic].

options.formula:
IF(
  {display_url} != "",
  "<iframe width='315' height='560' src='" & SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE({display_url}, "http://", "https://"), ".mov", ".mp4") & "' frameborder='0' allowfullscreen></iframe>",
  ""
)

IF( {platform}, CONCATENATE( IF( FIND("TikTok", {platform}), " TikTok ", "" ), IF( FIND("Instagram", {platform}), " Instagram ", "" ), IF( FIND("YouTube", {platform}), " YouTube ", "" ), IF( FIND("Twitter/X", {platform}), " Twitter/X ", "" ), IF( FIND("LinkedIn", {platform}), " LinkedIn ", "" ), IF( FIND("Other", {platform}), "Other", "" ) ), "" )
IF( {private_mode}, ' Private', ' Public' )
'<sl-copy-button value="' & {live_link} & '" copy-label="Click to copy" success-label="You did it!" error-label="Whoops, your browser does not support this"></sl-copy-button>'

IF(
  AND(
    {submission_close_date},
    DATETIME_DIFF({submission_close_date}, NOW(), 'days') <= 2,
    DATETIME_DIFF({submission_close_date}, NOW(), 'days') >= 0
  ),
  'true',
  'false'
)

fields.name: timeline
fields.defaultValue: Timeline

fields.name: timeline_sub_title
fields.defaultValue: Submission window for this brief

fields.name: creator_requirements
fields.defaultValue: Creator Requirements

fields.name: c-r_sub_title
fields.defaultValue: The technical details your content must have

fields.name: quality_standards
fields.defaultValue: Quality Standards

fields.name: q-s_sub_title_int
fields.defaultValue: AI review thresholds for this brief

fields.name: q-s_sub_title_ext
fields.defaultValue: Standards your content will be reviewed against

fields.name: title
fields.defaultValue: Brief

fields.name: name
fields.defaultValue: Untitled Video

options.formula:
IF(
  {submission_type (submissions)} = "Example/Swipe File",
  "This is an example video for reference only.",
  IF(
    OR(
      {product_screen_time_status} = "FAIL",
      {hook_speed_status} = "FAIL",
      {cta_placement_status} = "FAIL",
      {face_time_status} = "FAIL",
      {text_legibility_status} = "FAIL",
      {audio_clarity_status} = "FAIL",
      {engagement_pacing_status} = "FAIL",
      {brand_mention_count_status} = "FAIL",
      {copyright_status} = "FAIL",
      {content_moderation_status} = "FAIL"
    ),
    CONCATENATE(
      "Please make the following changes:\n\n",
      IF({product_screen_time_status} = "FAIL", "• Product visibility: " & {product_screen_time_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({hook_speed_status} = "FAIL", "• Hook timing: " & {hook_speed_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({cta_placement_status} = "FAIL", "• Call-to-action: " & {cta_placement_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({face_time_status} = "FAIL", "• Creator visibility: " & {face_time_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({text_legibility_status} = "FAIL", "• Text quality: " & {text_legibility_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({audio_clarity_status} = "FAIL", "• Audio quality: " & {audio_clarity_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({engagement_pacing_status} = "FAIL", "• Scene changes: " & {engagement_pacing_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({brand_mention_count_status} = "FAIL", "• Brand mentions: " & {brand_mention_count_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({copyright_status} = "FAIL", "• Copyright: " & {copyright_details} & "\n", ""),
      IF({content_moderation_status} = "FAIL", "• Content moderation: " & {content_moderation_details} & "\n", ""),
      "\nPlease resubmit once these issues are addressed."
    ),
    "All quality thresholds passed! Great work."
  )
)

IF(
  AND({status} = "Pending", {display_url} = ""),
  {loading_code},
  IF(
    {display_url} != "",
    "<video width='315' height='560' style='border-radius:8px;object-fit:cover;' controls playsinline><source src='" & {display_url} & "' type='video/mp4'></video>",
    ""
  )
)

IF({notification_type} = "System update", {system_update_message}, 
  SWITCH({notification_type},
    "Welcome", "Thanks for joining Brieflee! We're excited to help you streamline your UGC content review process. If you have any questions or need help getting started, just reach out.",
    "Submission received", CONCATENATE(IF({creator_name (submissions)}, CONCATENATE({creator_name (submissions)}, " submitted content for "), "You submitted content for "), IF({name (briefs)}, {name (briefs)}, "review"), ". AI review in progress."),
    "Review completed", CONCATENATE(IF({creator_name (submissions)}, CONCATENATE({creator_name (submissions)}, "'s submission for "), "Your submission for "), IF({name (briefs)}, {name (briefs)}, "review"), " scored ", {overall_rating (reviews)}, "/5 stars. ", IF({overall_status (reviews)} = "Pass", "All thresholds met.", IF({overall_status (reviews)} = "Fail", "Some thresholds not met.", "Review status pending."))),
    "Content approved", CONCATENATE(IF({creator_name (submissions)}, CONCATENATE({creator_name (submissions)}, "'s submission for "), "Your submission for "), IF({name (briefs)}, {name (briefs)}, "review"), " has been approved and is ready to use."),
    "Content rejected", CONCATENATE(IF({creator_name (submissions)}, CONCATENATE({creator_name (submissions)}, "'s submission for "), "Your submission for "), IF({name (briefs)}, {name (briefs)}, "review"), " has been rejected. Feedback sent to creator."),
    "Flagged for review", CONCATENATE(IF({creator_name (submissions)}, CONCATENATE("Submission from ", {creator_name (submissions)}), "Your submission"), " needs your attention. Failed thresholds: ", {failed_thresholds_list (reviews)}, ". Overall quality score: ", {overall_rating (reviews)}, "/5. Review to approve or request changes."),
    "Brief closed", CONCATENATE(IF({name (briefs)}, {name (briefs)}, "This brief"), " has been closed. No new submissions will be accepted."),
    "Closing soon", CONCATENATE(IF({name (briefs)}, {name (briefs)}, "This brief"), " closes in 2 days. Submit content now before the deadline."),
    "Trial ending", "Your 7-day trial ends in 2 days. Add payment details to keep using Brieflee.",
    ""
  )
)

IF(
  {notification_type} = "System update",
  {system_update_title},
  SWITCH(
    {notification_type},
    "Welcome", "Welcome to Brieflee! 👋",
    "Submission received", "New content just arrived",
    "Review completed", "Review finished",
    "Content approved", "Great news - content approved ✓",
    "Content rejected", "Content needs revision",
    "Flagged for review", "Your attention needed",
    "Brief closed", "Submissions now closed",
    "Closing soon", "Brief closing in 2 days",
    "Trial ending", "Your trial ends soon ⏳",
    ""
  )
)
'<sl-copy-button value="' & {live_link} & '" copy-label="Click to copy" success-label="You did it!" error-label="Whoops, your browser does not support this"></sl-copy-button>'

IF( {platform_name} = BLANK(), BLANK(), IF( LOWER({platform_name}) = 'tiktok', '', IF( LOWER({platform_name}) = 'instagram', '', IF( LOWER({platform_name}) = 'youtube', '', IF( LOWER({platform_name}) = 'linkedin', '', IF( LOWER({platform_name}) = 'upload', '', BLANK() ) ) ) ) ) )

IF(
  {platform_name} = "",
  "https://res.cloudinary.com/dspv9nm1n/image/upload/v1753197079/mhsggaojce1x4tyiionw.png",
  IF(
    LOWER({platform_name}) = "tiktok",
    "https://cdn.insightiq.ai/platforms_logo/logos/logo_tiktok.png",
    IF(
      LOWER({platform_name}) = "instagram",
      "https://cdn.insightiq.ai/platforms_logo/logos/logo_instagram.png",
      IF(
        LOWER({platform_name}) = "youtube",
        "https://cdn.insightiq.ai/platforms_logo/logos/logo_youtube.png",
        IF(
          LOWER({platform_name}) = "linkedin",
          "https://cdn.insightiq.ai/platforms_logo/logos/logo_linkedin.png",
          IF(
            LOWER({platform_name}) = "upload",
            "https://res.cloudinary.com/dspv9nm1n/image/upload/v1753197079/mhsggaojce1x4tyiionw.png",
            "https://res.cloudinary.com/dspv9nm1n/image/upload/v1753197079/mhsggaojce1x4tyiionw.png"
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

fields.name: loading_code
fields.defaultValue:
Analysing your content...

Our AI is reviewing your submission.
This takes a few minutes.

fields.name: logo
fields.defaultValue: https://res.cloudinary.com/dspv9nm1n/image/upload/v1764020467/sefdvpdwjndomwihxkpn.png

options.formula:
IF(
  {notification_type} = "System update",
  {system_update_title},
  SWITCH(
    {notification_type},
    "Welcome", "Welcome to Brieflee! 👋",
    "Submission received", "New content just arrived",
    "Review completed", "Review finished",
    "Content approved", "Great news - content approved ✓",
    "Content rejected", "Content needs revision",
    "Flagged for review", "Your attention needed",
    "Brief closed", "Submissions now closed",
    "Closing soon", "Brief closing in 2 days",
    "Trial ending", "Your trial ends soon ⏳",
    ""
  )
)

IF({notification_type} = "System update", {system_update_message}, 
  SWITCH({notification_type},
    "Welcome", "Thanks for joining Brieflee! We're excited to help you streamline your UGC content review process. If you have any questions or need help getting started, just reach out.",
    "Submission received", CONCATENATE(IF({creator_name (submissions)}, CONCATENATE({creator_name (submissions)}, " submitted content for "), "You submitted content for "), IF({name (briefs)}, {name (briefs)}, "review"), ". AI review in progress."),
    "Review completed", CONCATENATE(IF({creator_name (submissions)}, CONCATENATE({creator_name (submissions)}, "'s submission for "), "Your submission for "), IF({name (briefs)}, {name (briefs)}, "review"), " scored ", {overall_rating (reviews)}, "/5 stars. ", IF({overall_status (reviews)} = "Pass", "All thresholds met.", IF({overall_status (reviews)} = "Fail", "Some thresholds not met.", "Review status pending."))),
    "Content approved", CONCATENATE(IF({creator_name (submissions)}, CONCATENATE({creator_name (submissions)}, "'s submission for "), "Your submission for "), IF({name (briefs)}, {name (briefs)}, "review"), " has been approved and is ready to use."),
    "Content rejected", CONCATENATE(IF({creator_name (submissions)}, CONCATENATE({creator_name (submissions)}, "'s submission for "), "Your submission for "), IF({name (briefs)}, {name (briefs)}, "review"), " has been rejected. Feedback sent to creator."),
    "Flagged for review", CONCATENATE(IF({creator_name (submissions)}, CONCATENATE("Submission from ", {creator_name (submissions)}), "Your submission"), " needs your attention. Failed thresholds: ", {failed_thresholds_list (reviews)}, ". Overall quality score: ", {overall_rating (reviews)}, "/5. Review to approve or request changes."),
    "Brief closed", CONCATENATE(IF({name (briefs)}, {name (briefs)}, "This brief"), " has been closed. No new submissions will be accepted."),
    "Closing soon", CONCATENATE(IF({name (briefs)}, {name (briefs)}, "This brief"), " closes in 2 days. Submit content now before the deadline."),
    "Trial ending", "Your 7-day trial ends in 2 days. Add payment details to keep using Brieflee.",
    ""
  )
)

IF(
  DATETIME_DIFF(NOW(), {created_at}, 'minutes') < 1,
    'just now',
  IF(
    DATETIME_DIFF(NOW(), {created_at}, 'hours') < 1,
      DATETIME_DIFF(NOW(), {created_at}, 'minutes') & ' minutes ago',
    IF(
      DATETIME_DIFF(NOW(), {created_at}, 'days') < 1,
        DATETIME_DIFF(NOW(), {created_at}, 'hours') & ' hours ago',
      DATETIME_DIFF(NOW(), {created_at}, 'days') & ' days ago'
    )
  )
)

IF(
  {submission_type (submissions)} = "Example/Swipe File",
  "This is an example video for reference only.",
  IF(
    OR(
      {product_screen_time_status} = "FAIL",
      {hook_speed_status} = "FAIL",
      {cta_placement_status} = "FAIL",
      {face_time_status} = "FAIL",
      {text_legibility_status} = "FAIL",
      {audio_clarity_status} = "FAIL",
      {engagement_pacing_status} = "FAIL",
      {brand_mention_count_status} = "FAIL",
      {copyright_status} = "FAIL",
      {content_moderation_status} = "FAIL"
    ),
    CONCATENATE(
      "Please make the following changes:\n\n",
      IF({product_screen_time_status} = "FAIL", "• Product visibility: " & {product_screen_time_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({hook_speed_status} = "FAIL", "• Hook timing: " & {hook_speed_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({cta_placement_status} = "FAIL", "• Call-to-action: " & {cta_placement_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({face_time_status} = "FAIL", "• Creator visibility: " & {face_time_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({text_legibility_status} = "FAIL", "• Text quality: " & {text_legibility_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({audio_clarity_status} = "FAIL", "• Audio quality: " & {audio_clarity_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({engagement_pacing_status} = "FAIL", "• Scene changes: " & {engagement_pacing_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({brand_mention_count_status} = "FAIL", "• Brand mentions: " & {brand_mention_count_comment} & "\n", ""),
      IF({copyright_status} = "FAIL", "• Copyright: " & {copyright_details} & "\n", ""),
      IF({content_moderation_status} = "FAIL", "• Content moderation: " & {content_moderation_details} & "\n", ""),
      "\nPlease resubmit once these issues are addressed."
    ),
    "All quality thresholds passed! Great work."
  )
)

LEFT(
  TRIM(
    IF({product_screen_time_status} = "FAIL", "Product Screen Time, ", "") &
    IF({hook_speed_status} = "FAIL", "Hook Speed, ", "") &
    IF({cta_placement_status} = "FAIL", "CTA Placement, ", "") &
    IF({face_time_status} = "FAIL", "Face Time, ", "") &
    IF({text_legibility_status} = "FAIL", "Text Legibility, ", "") &
    IF({audio_clarity_status} = "FAIL", "Audio Clarity, ", "") &
    IF({engagement_pacing_status} = "FAIL", "Engagement Pacing, ", "") &
    IF({brand_mention_count_status} = "FAIL", "Brand Mention Count, ", "")
  ),
  LEN(
    TRIM(
      IF({product_screen_time_status} = "FAIL", "Product Screen Time, ", "") &
      IF({hook_speed_status} = "FAIL", "Hook Speed, ", "") &
      IF({cta_placement_status} = "FAIL", "CTA Placement, ", "") &
      IF({face_time_status} = "FAIL", "Face Time, ", "") &
      IF({text_legibility_status} = "FAIL", "Text Legibility, ", "") &
      IF({audio_clarity_status} = "FAIL", "Audio Clarity, ", "") &
      IF({engagement_pacing_status} = "FAIL", "Engagement Pacing, ", "") &
      IF({brand_mention_count_status} = "FAIL", "Brand Mention Count, ", "")
    )
  ) - 1
)
